positive_prompt: A photorealistic image-to-video animation from the provided image, 97 frames, 30 fps, about 3.2 seconds. Start exactly from the provided image: a metallic gray Changan CS55 PLUS SUV in a front three-quarter promotional view on a paved urban road beside glass and metal architectural panels. Preserve the original aspect ratio, vehicle shape, grille, badge, wheels, red accent strip, headlight details, license plate text, background structure, and overall composition. The first frame is already a calm staged vehicle shot, not a fast driving scene. During the clip, the SUV slowly creeps forward only a few inches in the direction it is facing; the wheels rotate subtly and coherently, reflections slide gently across the hood, side panels, windows, and grille, and the LED lights keep a steady soft glow. By the final frames, the car eases into a complete stop, remaining fully visible and centered in the same three-quarter angle. Use very subtle cinematic camera movement: a slow stable drift with gentle parallax, minimal and elegant, keeping the vehicle and logo details clear. Photorealistic, natural lighting, realistic colors, realistic physics, smooth temporal consistency, stable vehicle shape, calm cinematic motion.
negative_prompt: The SUV does not speed away, drift, brake hard, turn sharply, open doors, change model, change color, transform, fly, bounce, or move out of frame; the wheels do not spin unnaturally, the grille badge and CS55 PLUS plate text do not distort, crop, cropped frame, stretched image, squeezed image, aspect ratio change, missing important objects, changed composition, fast zoom, dramatic zoom, aggressive orbit, 360 orbit, shaky camera, unstable horizon, jump cut, flicker, blurry motion, motion blur artifacts, uncontrolled motion, random changes, melting objects, duplicated objects, disappearing objects, inconsistent vehicle shape, extra cars, changed background, unrealistic physics, rushed action, sudden motion change, incomplete action, endless motion, no final state, cartoon style, CGI look, text artifacts, logo distortion
